name: 情敵被碾壓解僱
description: 竹馬Chumo發現自己一直針對的「小公司老闆」其實是崇慶國際的真正掌門人，當場被解僱並求饒。權力反轉帶來的爽感。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: President Hoy is the head of Chunctioning Group. You messed with him. / No way. I can't lose this job. President Hua, I was blind and didn't recognize you. Please forgive me. / It's too late. Somebody drag him out.
